data.title: TELA Bio granted 3,600 restricted stock units to 3 new employees on Dec 9, 2025, as inducements for joining the company.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, TELA Bio, Inc. revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the offering of restricted stock units comprising 3,600 shares of common stock to three recently recruited employees. This induction grant, dated December 9, 2025, falls under the Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) exception and serves as a key component of each hire's compensation package. These units were awarded to entice the individuals to join TELA Bio.

data.title: 4DMT grants 13,800 RSUs to 3 new employees; part of the 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: In Emeryville, California on December 12, 2025, 4D Molecular Therapeutics revealed that the compensation committee of their board of directors awarded three new non-executive employees with 13,800 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on December 9, 2025. These RSUs were granted under the Company's 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, approved in February 2025, under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. 4D Molecular Therapeutics, listed as Nasdaq: FDMT, FDMT or 4DMT, is a key late-stage biotechnology firm focused on developing targeted therapeutics with the aim of revolutionizing treatment approaches and delivering significant advantages to patients.

data.title: Karbon Capital Partners Corp. completed a $345M IPO as a SPAC for future acquisitions.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Scranton, Pennsylvania, Karbon Capital Partners Corp. disclosed the completion of its special purpose acquisition company deal. The company was formed to merge with multiple businesses or entities, and the closing was confirmed by the officials. The specific details of the transaction were not mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Alector appoints Neil Berkley as Chief Financial Officer & Chief Business Officer effective 12/10/2025 after serving as CBO since Mar 2024.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in South San Francisco, California, Alector, Inc. disclosed that Neil Berkley, who has been Alector's Chief Business Officer (CBO) since March 2024 and also took on the role of Interim Chief Financial Officer (CFO) in June 2025, has now officially been appointed as CFO as of December 10, 2025. Alector, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ALEC, is dedicated to developing treatments to combat the progressive effects of neurodegenerative diseases. Neil Berkley will retain his position as CBO while assuming the responsibilities of CFO.

data.title: Navios Maritime Partners L.P. in Piraeus, Greece, announces senior leadership changes. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) Dec. 12, 2025, NYSE: NMM.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Piraeus, Greece, Navios Maritime Partners L.P. ("Navios Partners"), a global company owning and managing dry cargo and tanker ships, revealed significant modifications in senior leadership. This organization, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NMM, announced these changes to the public.
Ingredion Inc. announces quarterly dividend of $0.82/share.

data.title: Bitcoin miners switch to green power due to narrow profit margins. Mining hash price near all-time low.
data.description: The current cost of Bitcoin mining hash rate, which is a crucial factor in calculating profitability within the sector, is approaching all-time lows.
Fed's Daly: Risks remain to employment and from inflation.

data.title: GoodLeap and Tactical Infrastructure Partners finalize $140.2 million securitization for solar leases and agreements.
data.description: In a strategic move, GoodLeap, LLC has secured permanent financing for residential solar assets through a second securitization. This financing comes following a partnership with Tactical Infrastructure Partners and involves assets previously invested in. The initiative, announced on December 12, 2025 in San Francisco, marks a significant step with important numbers involved in funding and furthering the adoption of solar energy.

data.title: XY Retail now powers 1,300+ stores globally, solidifying its position as a leading retail OS platform for fashion and luxury brands.
data.description: In New York on December 3, 2025, XY Retail, a unified commerce platform supporting top fashion and luxury brands, revealed significant global achievements showcasing the growing significance of retail operating systems (OS) for successful modern retail.

data.title: Suntex Enterprises, Inc. buys JA Development & Construction, expanding into national construction sectors. OTX: SNTX, Texas firm.
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 12, 2025, Suntex Enterprises, Inc. (OTC: SNTX) revealed their acquisition of JA Development & Construction, a construction company from Texas. JA Development & Construction has a strong presence in residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.

data.title: Monolithic Power Systems declares Q4 2025 dividend of $1.56/share, payable on January 15, 2026.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Monolithic Power Systems, Inc., a prominent semiconductor power electronics solutions provider based in Schaffhausen, Switzerland, declared a fourth-quarter dividend of $1.56 per common stock share. This dividend is slated for payment on January 15, 2026, to all stockholders registered by the end of business on December 31, 2025. MPWR, listed on Nasdaq, is recognized globally for its high-performance offerings in the semiconductor industry.

data.title: IM Cannabis Corp. appoints Asi Levi as Chief Financial Officer. Operations in Israel & Germany.
data.description: Toronto and Glil Yam, Israel - On December 12, 2025, IM Cannabis Corp. (Nasdaq: IMCC), a prominent medical cannabis company operating in Israel and Germany, revealed the appointment of Asi following an earlier announcement on October 29, 2025. This news marks a significant development for IM Cannabis Corp. and its growing operations in the medical cannabis sector.

data.title: Catherine Mika appointed as EVP & GM of Aurora Procurement Solutions by Omni Workspace, serving nationwide clients.
data.description: In a recent announcement on December 12, 2025, Omni Workspace introduced Catherine Mika as the new Executive Vice President and General Manager of Aurora Procurement Solutions. This position, created specifically for Catherine, is effective immediately. She will be located in Minneapolis, leading the procurement solutions with her expertise.

data.title: Convoy of Hope named to Forbes' 2025 list of America's Top Charities for 7th year in a row.
data.description: For the seventh consecutive year, Convoy of Hope, a worldwide humanitarian and disaster relief organization based in Springfield, Missouri, has secured a spot on Forbes' prestigious list of America's Top 100 organizations. This recognition underscores the organization's consistent dedication to providing aid and support to those in need globally. The achievement was announced on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Book early for stress-free 2026 Outer Banks vacation. Popular weeks filling fast. Secure spot now.
data.description: Plan your 2026 Outer Banks vacation in advance to avoid last-minute stress, advises the Outer Banks Visitors Bureau. With popular weeks booking up quickly, it's recommended to secure your spot early. As of December 12, 2025, the demand for Outer Banks vacations is high, prompting travelers to make reservations promptly. Don't miss out on the opportunity to secure your desired dates for a stress-free vacation.
